title: Vegapunk’s Future Island
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Luffy, Unknown person #11, Lucci, Vegapunk, CP0 as Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.
scene: Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We created vegaforce 1 based on everything we learned from it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Please contact

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But there are things that I can't replicate with my science.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't believe it was a machine soldier made 900 years ago.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: A machine that even you can't replicate!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The problem is "power"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In the past, there was the power that was enough to change the common sense of the world today.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But for now, I'm happy luffy and the others are safe.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: But who is that girl?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's jewelry Bonney right? She is a pirate just like us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: So that girl got some trouble!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Also vegapunk's head is awesome!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Bonney...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I did some bad things to bonney

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh yeah! Old man, you should beg for forgiveness!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What do you even know about!? You damn brat!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: There were some things

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wished I handed it over to her.

dialogue.speaker: Lucci
dialogue.text: Also, straw hat Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It's FATED THAT YOU HAVE COME HERE!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Can you do something for me?...

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: Can you take me out of egghead?

dialogue.speaker: CP0
dialogue.text: This is Cipher Pol

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We wish to harbor.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What an insistent pet he has.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've got information that jewelry Bonney is heading to egghead

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: She's an eyesore who repeatedly escaped.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But we no longer have any use for her, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Next time we meet, I'll definitely kill her.

dialogue.speaker: Lilith
dialogue.text: Shaka!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It's the government's ship!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'd be bad if they knew we harbored pirates in here.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Also there's CPO, and Lucci is on that ship!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Just let them enter!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Rob Lucci is the assassin, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Eh? Rob Lucc!!!??

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How about you let me out of here right now!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh noo!! I hate him! Isn't he retired?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Please don't let him enter this island!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Robin, don't you worry! I'll protect you no matter how many times it takes!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Remember if

summary: This part advances the Egghead / Vegapunk Truth through 41 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
